data.biography: Jacky Cai Jie (simplified Chinese: 蔡洁; traditional Chinese: 蔡潔) is a Chinese actress who was born on January 2, 1989 in Guangdong. She studied at the Royal Institute of Technology in Melbourne, Australia. She made her Hong Kong feature film acting debut in 2014 in Aberdeen (香港仔), following up with roles in Operation Red Sea (红海行动) in 2018 and Line Walker 2: Invisible Spy (使徒行者2：諜影行動) in 2019.
data.name: Jacky Cai

data.biography: 蔡洁，生于广东湛江市，香港女演员，于2012年墨尔本华裔小姐竞选获冠军及“最上镜小姐”等七个奖项，于2013年国际中华小姐竞选获得“最受传媒欢迎佳丽”奖，于2014年大学毕业后加入娱乐圈，现为星王朝影视制作有限公司及邵氏兄弟、无线电视旗下艺人。
data.name: 蔡洁

data.biography: 蔡潔，生於廣東湛江市，香港女演員，於 2012 年墨爾本華裔小姐競選獲冠軍及「最上鏡小姐」等七個獎項，於 2013 年國際中華小姐競選獲得「最受傳媒歡迎佳麗」獎，於 2014 年大學畢業後加入娛樂圈，現為星王朝影視製作有限公司及邵氏兄弟、無綫電視旗下藝人。
data.name: 蔡潔

data.biography: Nam Sang-mi (남상미) is a South Korean actress.
data.name: Nam Sang-mi

data.biography:
韩国女演员。外号“谗猫”。所属经纪公司是Yeoleum Entertainment。

代表作：电视剧《甜蜜间谍》《狗与狼的时间》《食客》《天下无敌李平冈》等

电影《间谍女孩》《校园卧底》《强力三班》

2002年，还在念高二的南相美，因为帮忙补贴家用，利用课余时间到汉阳大学前的乐天利卖场打工。怎料，她美丽又清丽脱俗的外表却给汉阳大学的男生们留下了极其深刻的印象。南相美的相片被转贴到网上，各个专门网站甚至开始出现她的个人网页，著名的网站Daum上也成立了她的专属café，会员人数由最初的三千快速增加到一万，这位“网络美女”引起了杂志社、报社、电台及广告公司的关注，这些机构纷纷向她招手。虽然最初南相美还没有进入演艺圈的打算，但是后来在fans及经纪公司诚意的打动下，南相美终于成为了艺人，走上多姿多彩的演艺之路。
data.name: 南相美

data.biography:
韓國女演員。外號“讒貓”。所屬經紀公司是 Yeoleum Entertainment。

代表作：電視劇《甜蜜間諜》《狗與狼的時間》《食客》《天下無敵李平岡》等 電影《間諜女孩》《校園卧底》《強力三班》 2002 年，還在唸高二的南相美，因為幫忙補貼家用，利用課餘時間到漢陽大學前的樂天利賣場打工。怎料，她美麗又清麗脱俗的外表卻給漢陽大學的男生們留下了極其深刻的印象。南相美的相片被轉貼到網上，各個專門網站甚至開始出現她的個人網頁，著名的網站 Daum 上也成立了她的專屬 café，會員人數由最初的三千快速增加到一萬，這位“網絡美女”引起了雜誌社、報社、電台及廣告公司的關注，這些機構紛紛向她招手。雖然最初南相美還沒有進入演藝圈的打算，但是後來在 fans 及經紀公司誠意的打動下，南相美終於成為了藝人，走上多姿多彩的演藝之路。
data.name: 南相美

data.overview: Minato theo học piano tại một học viện âm nhạc. Một ngày nọ, cậu đem lòng yêu say đắm người bạn học Yukino, cô gái đang cất giấu một bí mật bi thương có thể thử thách tình yêu của họ đến tận cùng.
data.title: Bí Mật Bản Nhạc Ẩn Giấu

data.biography:
Jung Il-Woo é um modelo e ator sul-coreano que fez sua estreia como ator em 2006 com um papel menor no thriller 'O Mundo do Silêncio', mas primeiro alcançou a fama interpretando um adolescente rebelde e fanático por motocicletas apaixonado por seu professor. na sitcom familiar diurna 'Unstoppable High Kick'. Ele é filho de um ex-apresentador de telejornal.

Seu papel como Príncipe Yang Myung em “The Moon That Embraces the Sun” de 2012 lhe rendeu um MBC Excellence Award. 'The Moon That Embraces the Sun' se tornou um dos 50 melhores dramas coreanos em audiência, com uma audiência média de 45,8%.

Em agosto de 2006, Jung sofreu ferimentos em um acidente de carro enquanto andava com seu amigo de infância e colega ator Lee Min Ho, que ficou gravemente ferido. Em 2014, quando tinha 27 anos, Jung foi diagnosticado com um aneurisma cerebral após sentir uma dor de cabeça persistente.

Jung se alistou em dezembro de 2016 e recebeu alta em 30 de novembro de 2018.
丁一宇，韓國男演員。常見錯誤譯名為鄭日宇。他是家中長子，有一位大他五歲的姐姐，父親是一位商人，母親是國民大學古代織物研究所所長。
data.name: 丁一宇

data.biography:
丁一宇（정일우），1987年9月9日出生在韩国首尔，韩国影视男演员。毕业于汉阳大学戏剧电影学系。

2006年，在《安静的世界》中饰演主人公金相庆的少年时期，正式出道。同年，因出演MBC的《搞笑一家人》开始走红。2007年，获得MBC广播演艺大赏最佳新人奖。 2008年，成为北京奥运会韩国地区的火炬手。2009年，出演电视剧《拜托小姐》，饰演李泰云。 2012年，获得亚洲华鼎演艺人员发布盛典亚洲优秀青年男演员奖。2014年，主演MBC青春历史剧《巡夜人日志》。2015年1月，获得东方盛典亚洲影响力最受欢迎男演员。 [4]4月，主演中国内地电影《女汉子完美恋人》。7月，主演中韩合作网络剧《高品格单恋》。2016年，出演韩剧《灰姑娘与四骑士》 、泰剧《Love and Lies》和中国电视剧《恋人的谎言》
data.name: 丁一宇

data.biography: 丁一宇，韓國男演員。常見錯誤譯名為鄭日宇。他是家中長子，有一位大他五歲的姐姐，父親是一位商人，母親是國民大學古代織物研究所所長。
data.name: 丁一宇

data.biography: Sean Allan Krill (born June 10, 1971) is an American actor and singer who has appeared in film and television, on Broadway, Off-Broadway, and at prestigious regional theaters across the country. Krill made his Broadway debut as Sam Carmichael in 2008 in Mamma Mia!. He originated the role of Steve Healy in the Alanis Morissette musical Jagged Little Pill for which he was nominated for the 2020 Tony Award for Best Featured Actor in a Musical, and the cast album of the critically acclaimed show was the recipient of the 2020 Grammy Award for Best Musical Theater Album.
data.name: Sean Allan Krill

data.biography: Rajit Kapoor  born May 22, 1963 in Amritsar, is a distinguished Indian film and theatre actor and director. He gained fame portraying the fictional detective Byomkesh Bakshi in the eponymous television series on Doordarshan in 1993. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor for portraying Mahatma Gandhi in the 1996 film The Making of the Mahatma. His film debut was in Shyam Benegal's Suraj Ka Satvan Ghoda (1992). He also won acclaim for his role in the Malayalam film Agnisakshi. A prominent theatre personality, Kapur has appeared in recent films like Raazi, Uri: The Surgical Strike, and Mission Majnu.
data.name: Rajit Kapoor

data.biography:
Phiao Duangjai Hiransri is a Thai actress. She graduated in the Department of Drama of Faculty of Liberal Arts (Faculty of Fine and Applied Arts today) from Thammasat University and is a member of the Anatta Theatre Troupe.

She is best known for her appearances in an award winning Swedish drama series called "30 Degrees in February" which went on for two seasons between 2012 to 2016. She played a (male to female) transgender character named Oh.

Duangiai was nominated for Best Supporting Actress by the 25th 'Thailand National Film Association' (The Suphannahong National Film Awards) for her role in The 'Blue Hour' in 2015.
data.name: Duangjai Hiransri
ดวงใจ หิรัญศรี

data.biography: Ali Skovbye is a Canadian actress, born and raised in Vancouver, BC. Some of her credits include ONCE UPON A TIME, FRINGE, MOTIVE, SUPERNATURAL, FALLING
data.name: Alissa Skovbye

data.biography: Madrileña de nacimiento, Patrica Vico se encontró con la interpretación en su época universitaria, momento en el que tomó una de las decisiones que marcarían su carrera. Abandonó los estudios de publicidad para matricularse en la prestigiosa escuela de Arte Dramático de Cristina Rota. Empieza a hacerse un hueco en la industria a través de la televisión, gracias a pequeños papeles en series como Los ladrones van a la oficina o Hermanos de leche, preludios de su desembarco en la gran pantalla con la película Dile a Laura que la quiero. Brilla en su debut, y la pequeña pantalla por fin le ofrece un papel de envergadura: el de la joven Fifa en La casa de los líos. El éxito de la serie le abre las puertas del celuloide, y participa en cintas como Libertarias, Un asunto privado, Sabor latino, Pacto de brujas y El asombroso mundo de Borjamari y Pocholo en 2004. En este año también volverá a la televisión en uno de los roles que han marcado su trayectoria profesional: el de Maca en Hospital Central. Durante más de 150 episodios, Patricia se convirtió en uno de los personajes más queridos por el público. Con el final de su participación en la serie, la actriz sigue alimentando su currículum gracias a producciones como Toledo, Las aventuras del Capitán Alatriste o Rabia, mientras que en el cine la hemos podido ver en Perdona si te llamo amor o Cien años de perdón, a las órdenes de su marido Daniel Calparsoro.

Dakota Mayi Johnson (born October 4, 1989) is an American actress. The daughter of actors Don Johnson and Melanie Griffith, Johnson made her film debut at age ten with a minor role in Crazy in Alabama (1999), directed by her then-stepfather Antonio Banderas and starring her mother. After graduating from high school, she began auditioning for roles and had a minor part in The Social Network (2010). Johnson had her breakthrough playing the lead role in the erotic Fifty Shades film series (2015–2018). In 2016, she received a BAFTA Rising Star Award nomination and was featured in a Forbes 30 Under 30 list.

Her profile grew with roles in the crime drama Black Mass (2015), the drama A Bigger Splash (2015), the romantic comedy How to Be Single (2016), the horror film Suspiria (2018), the thriller Bad Times at the El Royale (2018), the coming-of-age film The Peanut Butter Falcon (2019), the psychological drama The Lost Daughter (2021), the romantic drama Cha Cha Real Smooth (2022), and the superhero film Madame Web (2024).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Dakota Johnson, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Dakota Johnson

data.biography:
Dakota Mayi Johnson (Austin, Texas, 4 de octubre de 1989) es una actriz y modelo estadounidense.

Hija de los actores Melanie Griffith y Don Johnson, es conocida por su papel al interpretar a Anastasia Steele en la trilogía cinematográfica de Cincuenta sombras de Grey, y por interpretar a Kate Fox en la serie estadounidense Ben y Kate, para la cadena FOX.

💥Дакота Майи Джонсон. Родилась в 1989-ом году в Остине, Техас, США. Росла в семье с 6-ью братьями и сёстрами. Родители работали актёрами. Училась в школе Аспена. Работает актрисой, продюсером и моделью. Личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🏆Главные награды🏆: People’s Choice Awards (2016) [Пятьдесят оттенков серого], Номинация на BAFTA (2016) [восходящая звезда]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Пятьдесят оттенков серого» (2015), «Материалистка» (2025), «В порядке ли я?» (2022), «Мадам Паутина» (2024)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Дакота заядлый читатель, в марте 2024-го года она запустила книжный клуб "TeaTime"
data.name: Дакота Джонсон

data.biography:
Dakota Mayi Johnson (née le 4 octobre 1989) est une actrice et mannequin américaine. Elle est la fille des acteurs Melanie Griffith et Don Johnson. Elle a fait ses débuts à l'écran aux côtés de sa mère dans la comédie dramatique Crazy en Alabama (1999) et a été nommée Miss Golden Globe en 2006. Après avoir obtenu son diplôme d'études secondaires, elle a recommencé à jouer avec des rôles dans The Social Network (2010), Beastly (2011), 21 Jump Street (2012), Need for Speed (2014) et la comédie éphémère Ben et Kate (2012-2013).

Elle a reçu une reconnaissance internationale en 2015 après avoir décroché le rôle principal d'Anastasia Steele dans le drame romantique Fifty Shades of Grey, qui l'a catapultée vers la gloire et lui a valu le People's Choice Award for Favorite Dramatic Movie Actress. La même année, elle a participé à Black Mass et A Bigger Splash, ce qui lui a valu une nomination au BAFTA Rising Star Award. Elle a également joué dans la comédie romantique How to Be Single (2016) et reprendra son rôle de Anastasia Steele dans Fifty Shades Darker (2017) et Fifty Shades Freed (2018).

Dakota Johnson Texas'ta dünyaya geldi. Gençlik yıllarında dansla yakından ilgilendi. 12 yaşında çocuk model olarak çekimlere katılmaya başladı. 1999 yılında Antonio Banderas'ın yönettiği Crazy in Alabama filminde annesi ile birlikte rol aldı. 2006 yılında Miss Golden Globe seçildi. 2009 yılında dünyaca ünlü giyim markası Mango için modellik yapmaya başladı.

Okul hayatını tamamladıktan sonra oyunculuk kariyeri başladı. 2010 yılında Facebook'un kuruluş serüveninin anlatıldığı Jesse Eisenberg ve Justin Timberlake'in başrol oynadığı The Social Network filminde yer aldı. Filmin sekiz dalda ödül almasının ardından Dakota Johnson oyunculuk kariyerinde hızlı bir yükseliş yaşadı. Ardından sırasıyla Beastly, Theo, For Ellen, Savage Innocent, Goats gibi birçok yapımda yer aldı.

İlk televizyon deneyimini ise 2012 de başlayan Ben and Kate isimli dizide yaşadı. 2013 yılında dizi ilk sezonunu tamamlandı. Bu dizi Johnson'ın ününü arttırmasına yardımcı oldu. Bunlar dışında Need for Speed adlı filmde ve William Shakespeare'in oyunu olan Cymbeline adlı filmde rol aldı.

Dakota Johnson (teljes nevén Dakota Mayi Johnson) 1989. október 4-én született Austinban. Szülei Don Johnson és Melanie Griffith. Hat féltestvére van. A főiskola befejezése után a William Morris ügynökséggel kötött szerződést, és elindult színészi karrierje. Sikereket ért el a modellvilágban is, dolgozott például a Mangonak is.

Első filmszerepét a Tűzforró Alabama (1999) című filmben kapta, ami gyakorlatilag egy családi vállalkozás volt: nevelőapja, Antonio Banderas rendezte, Johnson filmbeli testvérét féltestvére, Stella Banderas alakította, anyjukat pedig édesanyjuk, Melanie Griffith.

Beleszületni egy sztár-családba közel sem olyan kellemes, mint amilyennek első ránézésre tűnik. Az állandó médiafigyelemnek kitett törékeny szépség 2007-ben alkoholizmussal rehabilitációs központba került.

Az Oscar-díjas Social Network - A közösségi háló (2010) című filmben volt néhány jelenete Justin Timberlake-kel. A rendező szerint Johnson kihozta ebből a kis szerepből a maximumot. A forgatás után Johnson azonnal törölte magát a Facebook közösségi oldalról, mert aggódott, hogy internetfüggő lesz.

A következő kisebb szerepét egy Szépség és a szörnyeteg feldolgozásban kapta, ami a Csúf szerelem (2011) címmel jelent meg. 2012-ben már több filmben szerepelt: 21 Jump Street - A kopasz osztag (2012), Gay Dude (2012), Goats (2012), For Ellen (2012), Ötéves jegyesség (2012), Theo (2013), Need for Speed (2014).

Jelenleg forgatják A szürke ötven árnyalatát, amelyben Johnson játssza a főszerepet. A film várhatóan 2015-ben kerül a mozikba.

Dakota Mayi Johnson ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Filmproduzentin.

Dakota Johnson ist die Tochter der Schauspieler Don Johnson und Melanie Griffith sowie die Enkelin der Schauspielerin Tippi Hedren.

Berühmt wurde sie mit der weiblichen Hauptrolle in den Verfilmungen der Romanreihe Fifty Shades of Grey.
data.name: Dakota Johnson

data.biography: Dakota Mayi Johnson to amerykańska modelka i aktorka. Jest córką Dona Johnsona i Melanie Griffith. Ma sześcioro rodzeństwa przyrodniego. Jako dziecko uczyła się w Aspen Community School w Aspen (Kolorado, USA) i uwielbiała taniec. W wieku 12 lat zainteresowała się modelingiem (po sesji dla "Teen Vogue"). Jako aktorka debiutowała już w 1999 roku rolą Sondry w "Wariatce z Alabamy" grając u boku matki, przyrodniej siostry Stelli i ciotki Tracy. Zanim powróciła do aktorstwa i modelingu, w 2007 roku spędziła miesiąc  na odwyku w Visions Teen Treatment Center - klinice dla nastolatków uzależnionych od alkoholu i narkotyków w Malibu (Kalifornia, USA). Następny jej występ przypadł dopiero na 2010 rok w "The Social Network". Potem było kilka innych ról m.in. w "Bestii" i "Jeszcze dłuższych zaręczynach", aż do serialu "Ben i Kate", który przyniósł jej sławę. W 2013 roku została zaangażowana do trzech głośnych produkcji: "Need for Speed", "Cymbeline" i "Pięćdziesiąt twarzy Greya".

Attrice e modella statunitense. È nota principalmente per aver vestito i panni di Anastasia Steele nella saga cinematografica iniziata con Cinquanta sfumature di grigio, tratta dai romanzi della scrittrice britannica E. L.

H Ντακότα Τζόνσον (4 Οκτωβρίου 1989) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός και μοντέλο. Γεννήθηκε το 1989 στο Όστιν του Τέξας. Είναι κόρη των ηθοποιών Ντον Τζόνσον και Μέλανι Γκρίφιθ, και εγγονή της Τίπι Χέντρεν. Πραγματοποίησε την πρώτη της εμφάνιση στον κινηματογράφο το 1999 στην ταινία Το καλοκαίρι της ελευθερίας, όπου έπαιξε μαζί με τη μητέρα της και την ετεροθαλή της αδελφή, Στέλλα Μπαντέρας. Στη συνέχεια, έπαιξε σε διάφορες ταινίες όπως: The Social Network, For Ellen, Need for Speed και Κάτω από τον ήλιο. Έγινε ευρέως γνωστή το 2015 από τον πρωταγωνιστικό της ρόλο στην ταινία Πενήντα Αποχρώσεις του Γκρι και στα σίκουέλ της Πενήντα Πιο Σκοτεινές Αποχρώσεις του γκρι (2017) και Πενήντα αποχρώσεις του γκρι: Απελευθέρωση (2018). Για την πρώτη ταινία έλαβε δύο Χρυσά Βατόμουρα και μία υποψηφιότητα για το βραβείο BAFTA Rising Star (Κινηματογραφικό Βραβείο BAFTA Ανερχόμενου αστέρα). Στην τηλεόραση, έχει εμφανιστεί στη σειρά The Office, ενώ ήταν στο βασικό καστ της σειράς Ben and Kate.

达科塔·约翰逊（Dakota Johnson），1989年10月4日出生于美国德克萨斯州奥斯汀，美国影视演员、模特。

1999年，达科塔·约翰逊在10岁时出演个人银幕处女作《疯狂阿拉巴马》。2001年，开始对模特行业产生了兴趣。2006年，签约模特公司IMG Models，从而正式开始了她的模特生涯；同年，被评选为第63届金球奖金球小姐。2010年，参演传记电影《社交网络》。2013年，凭借爱情电影《五十度灰》入围第25届MTV电影奖-最具突破表演奖。2017年，由其主演的爱情电影《五十度黑》上映。2018年，主演恐怖电影《阴风阵阵》。2019年，由其主演的冒险电影《花生酱猎鹰》首映 。2021年，由其出演的爱情音乐电影《天后小助理》上映  。
data.name: 达科塔·约翰逊

data.biography: Dakota Mayi Johnson (Austin, Texas, 4 d'octubre de 1989) és una actriu i model estatunidenca. És filla dels actors Don Johnson i Melanie Griffith, i neta de Tippi Hedren. Antonio Banderas va ser padrastre seu.

data.name: ดาโกต้า จอห์นสัน

data.biography:
狄高達·莊遜（Dakota Johnson），1989 年 10 月 4 日出生於美國德克薩斯州奧斯汀，美國影視演員、模特。

1999 年，狄高達·莊遜在 10 歲時出演個人銀幕處女作《Crazy in Alabama》。2001 年，開始對模特行業產生了興趣。2006 年，簽約模特公司 IMG Models，從而正式開始了她的模特生涯；同年，被評選為第 63 屆金球獎金球小姐。2010 年，參演傳記電影《社交網絡》。2013 年，憑藉愛情電影《格雷的五十道色戒》入圍第 25 屆 MTV 電影獎 - 最具突破錶演獎。2017 年，由其主演的愛情電影《格雷的五十道色戒 2》上映。2018 年，主演恐怖電影《陰風陣陣》。2019 年，由其主演的冒險電影《迷途花生醬》首映 。2021 年，由其出演的愛情音樂電影《我老細係天後》上映 。
data.name: 狄高達·莊遜

รัฐนันท์ จรรยาจิรวงศ์

data.biography:
Lloyd Vernet "Beau" Bridges (born December 9, 1941) is an American actor and director. He is a three-time Emmy, two-time Golden Globe and one-time Grammy Award winner, as well as a two-time Screen Actors Guild Award nominee. He was awarded a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame on April 7, 2003, for his contributions to the television industry. He is the son of actor Lloyd Bridges and elder brother of fellow actor Jeff Bridges.

In 1948, he had an uncredited role in Force of Evil, and No Minor Vices, while in 1949, he played in the film The Red Pony. In the 1962–1963 television season, he and his brother, Jeff, appeared on their father's series, The Lloyd Bridges Show. He appeared in other television series too, including National Velvet (1962), The Fugitive (1963), Bonanza (1967), Mr. Novak (1963), and The Loner (1966). He appeared in such feature films during that time as The Landlord (1970), The Other Side of the Mountain (1975), Greased Lightning (1977), Norma Rae (1979), Heart Like a Wheel (1983), and The Hotel New Hampshire (1984).

In 1989, in perhaps his best-known role, he starred in The Fabulous Baker Boys. In the 1993–94 television season, he appeared with his father in the 15-episode series Harts of the West. In 1998, he starred as Judge Bob Gibbs in the one-season Maximum Bob on ABC. He had a recurring role in the Showtime series Beggars and Choosers (1999–2000).

In 2001, he guest-starred as Daniel McFarland, in two episodes in Will & Grace. From 2002 to 2003, he took on the role of Senator Tom Gage in The Agency. In January 2005, he was cast as Major General Hank Landry in Stargate SG-1. He also played the character in five episodes of the spin-off series Stargate Atlantis, as well as the two direct to DVD films Stargate: The Ark of Truth and Stargate: Continuum, both in 2008. In 2005, he guest-starred as Carl Hickey in My Name Is Earl; later, his character became recurring. He received a 2007 Emmy Award nomination for his performance. In 2009, he guest-starred as Eli Scruggs on the 100th episode of Desperate Housewives and received an Emmy Award nomination for his performance.

In 2011, he guest-starred in Brothers and Sisters, and in Franklin & Bash. In 2012, he took on the role of J.B. Biggley in the hit revival of the Broadway musical How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying. In 2013, he became a major character on the CBS television show The Millers. He has had several roles in movies since then including Underdog Kids (2015), and Lawless Range (2016). He has also had guest roles on the shows Masters of Sex (2013–2016) and Code Black (2016).
data.name: Beau Bridges

data.biography: Beau Bridges (eigentlich Lloyd Vernet Bridges III) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler. Er ist der Sohn des Schauspieler-Ehepaars Lloyd Bridges und Dorothy Bridges (geborene Simpson) sowie der ältere Bruder des Schauspielers Jeff Bridges.
data.name: Beau Bridges

data.biography: Lloyd Vernet Bridges III mais conhecido como Beau Bridges é um premiado ator norte-americano. Filho do também famoso ator Lloyd Bridges e da atriz e escritora Dorothy Simpson. É irmão do também ator Jeff Bridges.

Beau jest synem aktora Lloyda Bridgesa i jego ukochanej z czasów szkolnych, Dorothy. Urodził się dwa dni po ataku na Pearl Harbor, przy blasku świec, ponieważ nie było prądu. Dostał imiona Lloyd Vernet Bridges III, a rodzice bardzo szybko zaczęli nazywać go Beau (tak jak syna Ashley Wilkes w "Przeminęło z wiatrem", książki, którą w tym czasie oboje czytali). Jego młodszy brat, Jeff, również aktor, urodził się w 1949 roku, a siostra Cindy w 1950.

Rozpoczął studia na University of Hawaii, ale porzucił naukę na rzecz aktorstwa i już w 1967 roku dostał swoją pierwszą dużą rolę. W czasie swojego pierwszego małżeństwa z Julie Landifield adoptowali Caseya, następnie na świat przyszedł Jordan. Z drugą żoną, Wendy, ma troje dzieci - Dylana ( ur. 1985), Emily (ur. 1987) oraz Ezekiela.

Beau lubi grać na gitarze, kolekcjonuje amerykańskie instrumenty perkusyjne. Kocha ocean (pływanie, surfing). Działa aktywnie na rzecz ochrony środowiska oraz kontroli dostępu do broni palnej.

Lloyd Vernet "Beau" Bridges III (Los Angeles, Califòrnia, 9 de desembre de 1941) és un actor i director estatunidenc. Fill del també actor Lloyd Bridges i Dorothy Dean Simpson. Va ser anomenat "Beau" pel fill de Ashley Wilkes en "Gone with the Wind". Bridges és germà del també actor Jeff Bridges.
美国演员、导演

DỰ ÁN R.E.D.
data.overview:
Năm 2026, một tân truyền thuyết khai màn… Series tokusatsu mới 【DỰ ÁN R.E.D.】 chính thức khởi động!

Trong cột mốc 2026, ngay trong khuôn khổ thương hiệu Super Sentai đã được yêu mến suốt 50 năm kể từ 1975, một dòng anh hùng đặc hiệu hoàn toàn mới mang tên 【DỰ ÁN R.E.D.】 sẽ được triển khai.

Tên gọi PROJECT R.E.D. lấy từ cụm Anh ngữ “Records of Extraordinary Dimensions”, bản dịch của 「超次元英雄譚」, hàm ý một Hồng sắc anh hùng bước ra tân thế giới quan để khai mở sử thi mới.

Series này hướng đến mô thức đa thế giới, nơi các tác phẩm tương lai sẽ giao thoa – crossover để tạo chiều sâu và mở rộng vũ trụ chung.

Năm mươi năm lịch sử – nay vươn lên tân đỉnh cao.

2026, bạn sẽ là nhân chứng của truyền thuyết mới.

Tác phẩm mở đầu là 『Siêu Vũ Trụ Cảnh Sát Gavan: Infinity』 — một tân Gavan, tiếp nối tinh thần cách tân của người tiền nhiệm và được tái thiết từ nền tảng hoàn toàn mới.

seasons.name: Siêu Cảnh Sát Vũ Trụ Gavan Infinity

data.tagline: Một tân anh hùng sự bắt đầu khai mở.

data.biography: 2004년 MBC 드라마 《사랑한다 말해줘》를 통해 데뷔하였다. 2007년에 방송된 SBS 드라마 《로비스트》에서는 배우 장진영의 아역 마리아를 연기했고, KBS 드라마 《대왕세종》에서는 탤런트 이윤지의 아역인 소헌왕후를 연기했다. 이후 여러 작품에서 두각을 나타내며 이름을 알렸는데, 2008년에 MBC 드라마 《에덴의 동쪽》에서 한지혜의 아역인 지현 역을 통해 본격적으로 주목을 받았다. 이후 작품활동이 뜸하다가 2009년에 MBC 드라마 《선덕여왕》에서 이요원의 아역인 어린 덕만을 연기하면서 일약 최고의 아역배우로 주목받는다. 이후 SBS 드라마 《크리스마스에 눈이 올까요?》에서 한예슬의 아역인 지완 역을 맡았고, SBS 드라마 《자이언트》에서는 박진희의 아역인 정연 역을 연기했다. 그리고 2017년 SBS 수목드라마 《수상한 파트너》라는 드라마에 은봉희라는 역을 맡았다. 2018년 tvN 드라마 《백일의 낭군님》에서 홍심이 역을 연기하였다. 2020년 NBC 월화 드라마 《365: 운명을 거스르는 1년》에서 신가현 역을 연기하였다. 그리고 2022년 8월 27일부터 방영한 tvN 드라마 《작은 아씨들》에서 오인경을 연기하였다.
data.name: 남지현

data.biography:
Nam Ji-hyun (born September 17, 1995) is a South Korean actress who successfully transitioned from being one of the industry's premier child artists to an acclaimed lead, well-loved for her roles in Queen Seondeok, Shopping King Louis, Suspicious Partner, and 100 Days My Prince.

Nam began her career as a child actress, and is best known for her roles in East of Eden (2008), Queen Seondeok (2009), Will It Snow for Christmas? (2009), Angel Eyes (2014), and What Happens to My Family? (2014). She also appeared in the miniseries Girl Detective, Park Hae-sol, teen drama To the Beautiful You, and the films A Reason to Live and Hwayi: A Monster Boy.

In 2016, she headlined her first drama, MBC's romantic-comedy Shopaholic Louis with Seo In-guk, where she impressed viewers with her acting.

In 2017, she starred in SBS's legal drama Suspicious Partner alongside Ji Chang-wook. The show enjoyed modest viewership share, but it beat its competitor by topping the important 20-49-year-old demographic, as well as streaming, popularity, and brand reputation charts for consecutive weeks. In 2018, Nam starred alongside EXO's D.O in the historical romance drama 100 Days My Prince. The series was a commercial success, becoming the fifth highest-rated Korean drama in cable television history. In 2020, Nam starred in the fantasy mystery thriller 365: Repeat the Year as a perfectionist webtoon writer.
data.name: Nam Ji-hyun

data.biography:
Nam Ji Hyun je jihokorejská herečka. Z jedné z nejlepších dětských umělkyň se úspěšně vypracovala na uznávanou herečku, kterou si diváci oblíbili díky jejím rolím ve filmech "Queen Seon Deok", "Shopping King Louis", "Suspicious Partner" a "100 Days My Prince".

Nam se v roce 2014 přihlásila na univerzitu Sogang jako studentka psychologie a 18. února 2020 ukončila studium. Ve stejném roce si zahrála ve fantasy mysteriózním thrilleru "365: Zopakuj rok" jako spisovatelka webových komiksů.

南志铉（韩语：남지현，Nam Ji Hyun，1995年9月17日－），韩国女演员，生于韩国仁川，毕业于西江大学心理学系

南志铉在7岁时通过《传播见闻录》而入行。由2004年起以儿童演员身份活跃，及后也在多套剧集扮演角色童演的部分，因此累积演艺经验。2013年，她凭动作片《华颐：吞噬怪物的孩子》获得第34届韩国国电影青龙奖新人女演员奖提名。2014年，开始以成年演员的身份演出戏剧，出演电视剧《天使之眼》和家庭剧《家族之间何必这样》。

2016年起，南志铉开始担任电视剧女主角，主演MBC浪漫爱情喜剧《购物王路易》 。2017年，和池昌旭主演SBS浪漫爱情喜剧《奇怪的搭档》 。2018年，和EXO成员都敬秀（D.O.）主演tvN古装爱情剧《百日的郎君》，人气再度上升。
data.name: 南志鉉

data.biography:
南志铉（韩语：남지현，Nam Ji Hyun，1995年9月17日－），韩国女演员，生于韩国仁川，毕业于西江大学心理学系

南志铉在7岁时通过《传播见闻录》而入行。由2004年起以儿童演员身份活跃，及后也在多套剧集扮演角色童演的部分，因此累积演艺经验。2013年，她凭动作片《华颐：吞噬怪物的孩子》获得第34届韩国国电影青龙奖新人女演员奖提名。2014年，开始以成年演员的身份演出戏剧，出演电视剧《天使之眼》和家庭剧《家族之间何必这样》。

2016年起，南志铉开始担任电视剧女主角，主演MBC浪漫爱情喜剧《购物王路易》 。2017年，和池昌旭主演SBS浪漫爱情喜剧《奇怪的搭档》 。2018年，和EXO成员都敬秀（D.O.）主演tvN古装爱情剧《百日的郎君》，人气再度上升。

data.biography:
Nam Ji-hyun (nascida em 17 de setembro de 1995) é uma atriz sul-coreana que passou com sucesso de uma das principais artistas infantis da indústria para uma protagonista aclamada, amada por seus papéis em Queen Seondeok, Shopping King Louis, Suspicious Partner, e 100 dias, meu príncipe.

Nam começou sua carreira como atriz infantil e é mais conhecida por seus papéis em East of Eden (2008), Queen Seondeok (2009), Will It Snow for Christmas? (2009), Angel Eyes (2014) e O que acontece com minha família? (2014). Ela também apareceu na minissérie Girl Detective, Park Hae-sol, no drama adolescente To the Beautiful You e nos filmes A Reason to Live e Hwayi: A Monster Boy.

Em 2016, ela encabeçou seu primeiro drama, a comédia romântica Shopaholic Louis da MBC, com Seo In-guk, onde impressionou os espectadores com sua atuação.

Em 2017, ela estrelou o drama jurídico da SBS, Suspicious Partner, ao lado de Ji Chang-wook. O programa teve uma participação de audiência modesta, mas venceu seu concorrente ao liderar o importante grupo demográfico de 20 a 49 anos, bem como gráficos de streaming, popularidade e reputação de marca por semanas consecutivas. Em 2018, Nam estrelou ao lado de D.O do EXO no drama de romance histórico 100 Days My Prince. A série foi um sucesso comercial, tornando-se o quinto drama coreano de maior audiência na história da televisão a cabo. Em 2020, Nam estrelou o thriller de fantasia e mistério 365: Repeat the Year como um escritor perfeccionista de webtoon.

南志鉉（韓語：남지현，Nam Ji Hyun，1995 年 9 月 17 日－），韓國女演員，生於韓國仁川，畢業於西江大學心理學系 南志鉉在 7 歲時通過《傳播見聞錄》而入行。由 2004 年起以兒童演員身份活躍，及後也在多套劇集扮演角色童演的部分，因此累積演藝經驗。2013 年，她憑動作片《魔童殺手》獲得第 34 屆韓國國電影青龍獎新人女演員獎提名。2014 年，開始以成年演員的身份演出戲劇，出演電視劇《天使之眼》和家庭劇《家族之間何必這樣》。

2016 年起，南志鉉開始擔任電視劇女主角，主演 MBC 浪漫愛情喜劇《購物王路易》 。2017 年，和池昌旭主演 SBS 浪漫愛情喜劇《奇怪的搭檔》 。2018 年，和 EXO 成員都敬秀（D.O. ）主演 tvN 古裝愛情劇《百日的郎君》，人氣再度上升。
data.name: 南志鉉
